description: city in Los Angeles County, California, United States
description_wiki: Pasadena (  PAS-ə-DEE-nə) is a city in Los Angeles County, California, United States, 10 miles (16 km) northeast of downtown Los Angeles.

description: census-designated place in Los Angeles County, California, United States
description_wiki: Altadena (AL-tə-DEE-nə) is an unincorporated area, and census-designated place in the San Gabriel Valley and the Verdugos regions of Los Angeles County, California.
Woodbury University is a private university in Burbank, California, United States.

description: thoroughfare in Santa Monica, Beverly Hills, and Los Angeles, United States
description_wiki: Wilshire Boulevard ( WIL-shər) is a prominent 15.83 mi (25.48 km) boulevard in the Los Angeles area of Southern California, extending from Ocean Avenue in the city of Santa Monica east to Grand Avenue in the Financial District of downtown Los Angeles.

description: street in Los Angeles County, California, USA
description_wiki: Figueroa Street is a major north–south street in Los Angeles County, California, spanning from the Los Angeles neighborhood of Wilmington north to Eagle Rock.

description: college in Pasadena, California, United States
description_wiki: The ArtCenter College of Design is a private art college in Pasadena, California.
The Chouinard Art Institute was a professional art school founded in 1921 by Nelbert Murphy Chouinard (1879–1969) in the Westlake neighborhood of Los Angeles, California.

description: American animator, producer, director, screenwriter, voice actor and entrepreneur, founder of The Walt Disney Company (1901–1966)
description_wiki: Walter Elias Disney ( DIZ-nee; December 5, 1901 – December 15, 1966) was an American animator, film producer, voice actor, and entrepreneur.

entity: Snow White and the Seven Dwarfs

description: cultural movement that spanned the period roughly from the 14th to the 17th century
description_wiki: The Renaissance (UK:  rin-AY-sənss, US:   REN-ə-sahnss) is a European period of history and cultural movement taking place between the Late Middle Ages and the Early Modern era.

aliases: War to Resist US Aggression and Aid Korea
description: war between North and South Korea, 1950–1953
description_wiki: The Korean War (25 June 1950 – 27 July 1953) was an armed conflict the Korean Peninsula fought between North Korea (Democratic People's Republic of Korea; DPRK) and South Korea (Republic of Korea; ROK) and their allies.
